name: Spending New Years Eve With The Office's Plushie - Zhao
description:
"No, Junior, you CANNOT touch my ears."

FILLER BOT #5

✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦

PREMISE:

This stupid ass labubu got your boss to accept letting her and you (you were dragged into it because you were there at the wrong moment) work during new year's eve! And now, you're stuck here working with her. Lucky for you she offered a break to go out to the store eat something.

Some info:

- The quote i put there ISN'T present in the first message, i was just out of ideas.

- There's ZZZ lore, but i doubt it'll be used correctly.

- Idk her age so I just put 24.

- She's your superior.

✦ . 　⁺ 　 . ✦

Yap:

Happy early new year for y'all. And bruhhh stranger things is soooo ass, i was hyped for the new episodes but every day i just get more and more regretful of thinking Netflix would actually do something good with it. Anyway, still preparing the 2k special, dw.
